# 100. Set explicit file permissions across roles

**Date:** 2026-07-01

**Optional per env:** _required on all environments_


## CommCare Version Dependency
This change is not known to be dependent on any particular version of CommCare.


## Change Context
Many `file`/`copy`/`template` tasks across the ansible roles did not set an
explicit `mode`, so the resulting permissions depended on the umask of the
machine running Ansible rather than being pinned by the playbook. This
change sets an explicit mode (and, for a few sensitive files, `owner`/
`group`) on every affected task.

## Details
Most of these changes pin the mode Ansible was already applying by default, so
there is no change for those files. A handful of tasks also tighten
permissions and/or add explicit ownership where the previous default was
looser than it should have been for sensitive data:

- `pgbouncer-N.ini`, `pgbouncer.users`, and the classic `pgbouncer.ini` are
  now `0640`, owned by `postgres:postgres` (they contain credentials).
- `keepalived.conf` is now `0640`, owned by `root:root`.
- The cchq user's `~/.ssh` directory is now `0700`, and `~/.ssh/config` is
  now `0600`, owned by `cchq:cchq`.
- Postgres's `pg_hba.conf` is now `0640`, the WAL archive directory is now
  `0750`, and `recovery.conf` is now `0600`, owned by `postgres:postgres`.
- The ClickHouse data directory (used by Sentry) is now `0750`.

These changes will take effect the next time the relevant role/playbook runs.

## Steps to update
For the standard CommCare HQ stack, pull the latest `commcare-cloud` and run:

```bash
cchq <env> deploy-stack
```

This covers the common/ssh/datadog/lpar2rrd roles, postgresql/pgbouncer,
elasticsearch, kafka/zookeeper, commcarehq, couchdb2 (including its
keepalived/haproxy setup), nginx, http_proxy, cloudwatch_logs, and pg_repack.

If your environment self-hosts Sentry (i.e. has hosts in the `sentry`
inventory group), also run:

```bash
cchq <env> ap deploy_sentry.yml
```

`deploy-stack` does not touch the Sentry machine, so its own
postgresql/pg_hba/recovery.conf files, zookeeper, kafka, and the
sentry/clickhouse/snuba configuration and data directories are only
updated by `deploy_sentry.yml`.
